user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
**Draft Follow-up Message:**

Hi [Customer's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I’m following up on the ticket we resolved 5 days ago to check whether everything is still working smoothly on your end.

If you haven’t run into any further issues, that’s wonderful — no action needed. If anything has changed or if there’s anything else we can assist with, simply reply to this message and I’ll jump right back in.

Thank you again for your patience, and have a great day!

Best regards,  
Compass  
Customer Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the request as a support-related task and provided a professional, empathetic draft that aligns with its defined persona and behavioral guidelines.
